Penjabaran Risiko: Akses Tidak Terotorisasi terhadap Source Code Application
Akar Masalah: Kurangnya pengendalian akses berbasis peran (RBAC) yang komprehensif dan monitoring aktivitas pengembang terhadap source code repository
Penyebab: Tidak adanya integrasi Identity and Access Management (IAM) yang kuat dengan version control system, audit trail yang tidak memadai, serta kurangnya pelatihan keamanan bagi tim developer
Akibat: Potensi modifikasi, pencurian, atau penghapusan source code yang dapat mengakibatkan kehilangan kekayaan intelektual, gangguan layanan aplikasi, dan dampak finansial signifikan
Ancaman: Insider Threat; Unauthorized Access; Social Engineering
Kerentanan: Absence of role-based access control (RBAC) pada repository; Insufficient audit logging; Weak password policies; Lack of multi-factor authentication (MFA)
Pengendalian Saat Ini: Basic access control melalui username/password; Limited audit logging
Referensi Pengendalian: ISO 27001:2022 A.8.2.1 (User Registration); A.8.2.2 (Privileged Access Rights); A.8.2.3 (Information Access Restriction); A.9.2.1 (User Registration and De-registration); Annex A.8.3.1 (Password Management)

Penjabaran Risiko: Insufficient Encryption of Sensitive Data dalam Development Tools
Akar Masalah: Ketiadaan standar enkripsi data end-to-end untuk informasi sensitif yang tersimpan dalam development tools, serta belum ada mekanisme secure key management
Penyebab: Keterbatasan financial resource untuk implementasi enterprise-grade encryption solutions; Kurangnya awareness terhadap regulatory requirements (ISO 27001, GDPR); Absence of data classification policy
Akibat: Paparan data sensitif kepada pihak yang tidak berwenang, potensi compliance violations, kehilangan competitive advantage melalui reverse engineering, serta peningkatan risk profile organisasi
Ancaman: Data Breach; Man-in-the-Middle (MITM) Attack; Unauthorized Data Access; Physical Theft of Storage Media
Kerentanan: Unencrypted data storage; Weak cryptographic algorithms; Inadequate key management procedures; Absence of secure disposal mechanisms
Pengendalian Saat Ini: Basic encryption pada transit data; Ad-hoc encryption practices
Referensi Pengendalian: ISO 27001:2022 A.8.3.3 (Management of Removable Media); A.8.3.4 (Information and Other Assets Outside the Organization); A.10.1.1 (Cryptography Objectives); A.10.2.1 (Cryptographic Controls); A.10.3.1 (Cryptographic Key Management)

Penjabaran Risiko: Intellectual Property (IP) Rights Infringement terhadap Aplikasi Proprietary
Akar Masalah: Ketiadaan mekanisme proteksi IP yang komprehensif, termasuk inadequate patent filing, trademark registration, dan enforcement procedures; Absence of IP audit trail
Penyebab: Kurangnya coordination antara legal department dan IT team; Insufficient budget allocation untuk IP protection; Inadequate vendor management terhadap open-source license compliance
Akibat: Potensi litigasi biaya tinggi, reputasi damage, kehilangan revenue streams, forced code changes, serta constraint pada business growth initiatives
Ancaman: IP Piracy; Unauthorized Use of Trade Secrets; Infringement Claims; Unauthorized Disclosure to Competitors
Kerentanan: Lack of IP protection mechanisms; Inadequate contractual safeguards; Weak vendor management; Insufficient trade secret protection measures
Pengendalian Saat Ini: Basic copyright notices; Informal IP documentation
Referensi Pengendalian: ISO 27001:2022 A.5.1.1 (Policies for Information Security); A.5.1.2 (Information Security Roles and Responsibilities); A.8.1.1 (Inventory of Assets); A.13.1.1 (Management of Information Security Incidents and Improvements)

Penjabaran Risiko: Key Personnel Dependency Risk dalam Development Team
Akar Masalah: Konsentrasi knowledge kritis pada limited number of developers; Insufficient documentation of critical processes; Inadequate knowledge transfer mechanisms
Penyebab: High turnover rate dalam IT industry; Inadequate succession planning; Insufficient investment dalam talent development; Absence of knowledge management system
Akibat: Disruption terhadap development cycles, delays dalam project delivery, quality degradation, increased maintenance costs, serta potensi security vulnerabilities akibat knowledge loss
Ancaman: Key Personnel Resignation; Loss of Institutional Knowledge; Inadequate Backup Resources; Absence of Cross-Training
Kerentanan: Lack of documentation; Single point of failure; Absence of cross-functional training; Inadequate knowledge management procedures
Pengendalian Saat Ini: Basic project documentation; Ad-hoc knowledge sharing
Referensi Pengendalian: ISO 27001:2022 A.6.1.1 (Screening); A.6.2.1 (Confidentiality/Non-Disclosure Agreements); A.6.3.1 (Information Security Awareness and Training); A.6.3.2 (Information Security Competence)

Penjabaran Risiko: Inadequate API Specification Documentation dan Version Control
Akar Masalah: Ketiadaan centralized API documentation repository dengan proper version control; Absence of standardized API documentation format; Insufficient access controls terhadap API specifications
Penyebab: Rapid development cycles yang menyebabkan documentation lag; Lack of dedicated documentation team; Absence of API governance framework; Inadequate tooling infrastructure
Akibat: Integration failures, increased development time, security vulnerabilities melalui improper API usage, data consistency issues, serta difficulty dalam troubleshooting dan maintenance
Ancaman: Undocumented API Changes; API Misuse; Information Disclosure; Version Confusion
Kerentanan: Lack of centralized documentation; No version control mechanism; Inadequate access controls; Absence of change notification system
Pengendalian Saat Ini: Dispersed documentation; Manual versioning
Referensi Pengendalian: ISO 27001:2022 A.8.1.1 (Inventory of Assets); A.12.5.1 (Installation of Software on Operational Systems); A.12.6.1 (Management of Technical Vulnerabilities)

Penjabaran Risiko: Unauthorized Access dan Modification of Business Requirements Documents
Akar Masalah: Inadequate access controls pada shared documents; Absence of change tracking mechanisms; Insufficient authentication pada document repository
Penyebab: Reliance pada unmanaged file sharing systems; Lack of Information Classification policy; Inadequate IAM integration; Absence of audit logging for document access
Akibat: Misalignment antara business requirements dengan application implementation, project delays, scope creep, quality issues, serta potential compliance violations
Ancaman: Unauthorized Document Modification; Data Loss; Information Disclosure; Audit Trail Tampering
Kerentanan: Inadequate access control; Absence of change tracking; Weak document lifecycle management; Insufficient audit logging
Pengendalian Saat Ini: Basic file permissions; Manual version control
Referensi Pengendalian: ISO 27001:2022 A.8.2.2 (Privileged Access Rights); A.8.2.3 (Information Access Restriction); A.12.4.1 (Event Logging)

Penjabaran Risiko: Loss of Business Continuity akibat Data Center Infrastructure Failure
Akar Masalah: Inadequate redundancy dalam data center infrastructure; Insufficient disaster recovery planning; Inadequate backup systems; Limited failover capabilities
Penyebab: Budget constraints untuk infrastructure investment; Lack of comprehensive BCP/DRP assessment; Inadequate monitoring terhadap critical infrastructure; Absence of regular failover testing
Akibat: Extended downtime, loss of revenue, customer dissatisfaction, regulatory penalties, reputational damage, serta potential loss of critical business data
Ancaman: Hardware Failure; Natural Disasters; Power Outages; Cooling System Failure; Facility Compromise
Kerentanan: Single point of failure; Inadequate backup power systems; Insufficient redundancy; Inadequate disaster recovery procedures
Pengendalian Saat Ini: Basic power backup; Incomplete disaster recovery plan
Referensi Pengendalian: ISO 27001:2022 A.8.3.2 (Segregation of Networks); A.11.1.1 (Physical Security Perimeter); A.11.2.1 (Physical Entry); A.17.1.1 (Planning Information Security Continuity); A.17.2.1 (Implementing Information Security Continuity)

Penjabaran Risiko: Inadequate Testing Environment Isolation dan Data Sanitization
Akar Masalah: Ketiadaan proper network segregation antara test dan production environments; Inadequate data sanitization procedures; Improper handling dari sensitive production data dalam test environment
Penyebab: Cost optimization mindset terhadap infrastructure; Lack of data classification awareness; Absence of data sanitization policy; Inadequate security architecture review
Akibat: Accidental exposure dari sensitive data, compliance violations, security vulnerabilities dalam testing code yang may reach production, serta increased attack surface
Ancaman: Data Leakage from Test Environment; Cross-Contamination between Environments; Unauthorized Access to Test Data; Malware Propagation
Kerentanan: Inadequate network segregation; Unencrypted sensitive data dalam test environment; Absence of access controls; Insufficient audit logging
Pengendalian Saat Ini: Basic environment separation; Manual data handling
Referensi Pengendalian: ISO 27001:2022 A.8.3.2 (Segregation of Networks); A.12.1.3 (Segregation of Development, Testing and Operational Environments); A.8.3.3 (Management of Removable Media)

Penjabaran Risiko: Inadequate Vulnerability Management dan Patch Management dalam CI/CD Pipeline
Akar Masalah: Absence of automated vulnerability scanning dalam CI/CD pipeline; Insufficient patch management procedures; Inadequate security testing integration; Lack of security gates dalam deployment process
Penyebab: Prioritization pada speed-to-market over security considerations; Absence of DevSecOps culture; Inadequate staffing dalam security function; Lack of proper tooling
Akibat: Deployment dari vulnerable applications, increased security incident risk, compliance violations, extended remediation time, customer trust degradation
Ancaman: Vulnerable Code Deployment; Zero-Day Exploitation; Supply Chain Attacks; Malicious Code Injection
Kerentanan: Absence of SAST/DAST integration; No runtime security controls; Inadequate dependency scanning; Insufficient code review practices
Pengendalian Saat Ini: Basic code review; Limited security testing
Referensi Pengendalian: ISO 27001:2022 A.12.6.1 (Management of Technical Vulnerabilities); A.12.5.1 (Installation of Software on Operational Systems); A.14.1.1 (Information Security Requirements for Software Development)

Penjabaran Risiko: Inadequate Database Access Controls dan Privileged Access Management
Akar Masalah: Absence of comprehensive PAM solution; Inadequate role-based access control; Insufficient credential management; Lack of database audit logging
Penyebab: Legacy infrastructure dengan limited PAM capabilities; Budget constraints untuk enterprise security solutions; Inadequate security awareness; Absence of database hardening standards
Akibat: Unauthorized data access, data breach, data manipulation, compliance violations (GDPR, PCI-DSS), reputational damage, legal liability
Ancaman: Insider Threats; Unauthorized Data Queries; SQL Injection; Credential Theft; Privilege Escalation
Kerentanan: Weak password management; Excessive database privileges; Absence of session recording; Inadequate audit logging; Lack of IP whitelisting
Pengendalian Saat Ini: Basic authentication; Limited audit capability
Referensi Pengendalian: ISO 27001:2022 A.8.2.2 (Privileged Access Rights); A.8.2.4 (Access to Cryptographic Keys); A.12.4.1 (Event Logging); A.9.1.2 (Privileged Access Rights)

Penjabaran Risiko: Insufficient Data Classification dan Data Retention Policy Enforcement
Akar Masalah: Absence of formal data classification framework; Inadequate data retention policies; Insufficient data disposal procedures; Lack of automated data lifecycle management
Penyebab: Organizational complexity dalam multiple business units; Inadequate governance structure; Budget constraints; Lack of awareness tentang regulatory requirements
Akibat: Non-compliance dengan GDPR, personal data retention beyond necessary period, increased storage costs, difficulty dalam responding to data subject requests, regulatory fines
Ancaman: Regulatory Non-Compliance; Data Breach involving Unnecessary Data; Difficulty in Data Retrieval; Unauthorized Data Retention
Kerentanan: Absence of data classification policy; No automated data retention enforcement; Inadequate disposal mechanisms; Insufficient audit controls
Pengendalian Saat Ini: Ad-hoc retention practices; Manual data cleanup
Referensi Pengendalian: ISO 27001:2022 A.8.3.2 (Segregation of Networks); A.8.3.3 (Management of Removable Media); A.5.1.2 (Information Security Roles and Responsibilities)

Penjabaran Risiko: Inadequate Network Perimeter Security dan Firewall Rule Management
Nama Aset: Matriks Firewall Rules & Access Control List (ACL)
Akar Masalah: Complexity dalam managing firewall rules menyebabkan misconfigurations; Absence of firewall rule change management process; Insufficient review procedures; Presence dari unnecessary open ports
Penyebab: Rapid infrastructure changes tanpa corresponding firewall updates; Lack of automated rule management tools; Inadequate change control procedures; Insufficient auditing
Akibat: Unauthorized network access, lateral movement opportunities, data exfiltration, compliance violations, increased attack surface
Ancaman: Network Intrusion; Lateral Movement; Data Exfiltration; DDoS Attacks; Botnet Infection
Kerentanan: Overly permissive firewall rules; Absence of least-privilege principle; No rule deprecation process; Insufficient logging; Inadequate monitoring
Pengendalian Saat Ini: Basic firewall implementation; Limited rule review
Referensi Pengendalian: ISO 27001:2022 A.8.3.2 (Segregation of Networks); A.13.1.3 (Segregation of Networks); A.12.6.1 (Management of Technical Vulnerabilities)

Penjabaran Risiko: Inadequate SSL/TLS Certificate Management dan Expiration Handling
Akar Masalah: Absence of centralized SSL/TLS certificate management system; Inadequate certificate lifecycle tracking; Insufficient certificate renewal procedures; Lack of monitoring untuk expired certificates
Penyebab: Decentralized certificate management across different teams; Lack of automated certificate renewal systems; Inadequate alerting mechanisms; Limited tooling infrastructure
Akibat: Service disruption akibat expired certificates, security warnings di user browsers, potential customer access loss, compliance violations, reputational damage
Ancaman: Certificate Expiration; Man-in-the-Middle Attacks; User Trust Degradation; Service Unavailability
Kerentanan: Absence of centralized certificate management; No automated renewal; Inadequate tracking; Insufficient monitoring; Weak key management
Pengendalian Saat Ini: Manual certificate tracking; Periodic manual renewal
Referensi Pengendalian: ISO 27001:2022 A.10.2.1 (Cryptographic Controls); A.10.3.1 (Cryptographic Key Management); A.12.6.1 (Management of Technical Vulnerabilities)

Penjabaran Risiko: Inadequate Endpoint Security dan Device Management Controls
Akar Masalah: Absence of comprehensive endpoint protection platform (EPP); Insufficient mobile device management (MDM); Inadequate patch management; Weak device inventory controls
Penyebab: Decentralized device procurement; Budget constraints untuk enterprise security solutions; Heterogeneous device ecosystem; Inadequate IT governance
Akibat: Malware infections, ransomware attacks, data theft, compliance violations, operational disruptions, increased incident response costs
Ancaman: Malware Infection; Ransomware; Data Theft; Unauthorized Software Installation; Device Compromise
Kerentanan: Missing or outdated antivirus; Unpatched systems; Weak password policies; Absence of device encryption; No remote wipe capabilities
Pengendalian Saat Ini: Basic antivirus; Limited patch management
Referensi Pengendalian: ISO 27001:2022 A.12.2.1 (Controls Against Malware); A.12.6.1 (Management of Technical Vulnerabilities); A.8.1.3 (Acceptable Use of Assets)

Penjabaran Risiko: Inadequate Identity and Access Management (IAM) Implementation Maturity
Nama Aset: Aplikasi/Sistem Identity and Access Management (IAM) & PAM
Akar Masalah: Limited IAM platform capabilities untuk mendukung complex organizational requirements; Inadequate integration dengan legacy systems; Insufficient automation; Weak identity governance
Penyebab: Legacy infrastructure constraints; Budget limitations untuk modern IAM platform; Organizational restructuring complexity; Inadequate change management procedures
Akibat: Unauthorized access, privilege escalation, difficulty dalam compliance reporting, increased incident response complexity, regulatory violations
Ancaman: Identity Spoofing; Unauthorized Privilege Escalation; Access Provisioning Errors; Credential Theft
Kerentanan: Weak authentication mechanisms; Inadequate authorization controls; Manual access provisioning; Insufficient audit trails; No real-time monitoring
Pengendalian Saat Ini: Basic IAM functionality; Manual processes
Referensi Pengendalian: ISO 27001:2022 A.8.2.1 (User Registration); A.8.2.2 (Privileged Access Rights); A.8.2.3 (Information Access Restriction); A.8.2.4 (Access to Cryptographic Keys)

Penjabaran Risiko: Inadequate Incident Response dan Forensic Capability Implementation
Nama Aset: Dokumen Incident Response Plan (IRP) & Forensic Playbooks
Akar Masalah: Absence of comprehensive, regularly tested incident response procedures; Inadequate forensic tools dan capabilities; Insufficient training terhadap incident response team; Lack of clear escalation procedures
Penyebab: Limited budget allocation untuk incident response infrastructure; Inadequate staffing dalam security operations; Lack of awareness tentang incident response importance; Absence of tabletop exercises
Akibat: Extended incident detection dan response time, increased breach damage, loss of forensic evidence, compliance violations, regulatory penalties, reputational damage
Ancaman: Security Incidents; Data Breaches; Incident Detection Delays; Evidence Loss; Inadequate Breach Notification
Kerentanan: Absence of incident response plan; Limited forensic capabilities; No automated alerting; Insufficient log retention; Lack of team training
Pengendalian Saat Ini: Basic incident procedures; Limited forensic expertise
Referensi Pengendalian: ISO 27001:2022 A.16.1.1 (Planning and Preparing for Information Security Incident Handling and Response); A.16.1.5 (Response to Information Security Incidents)

Penjabaran Risiko: Inadequate Backup dan Disaster Recovery Capability
Akar Masalah: Insufficient backup frequency dan retention periods; Inadequate backup encryption; Limited failover capabilities; Lack of regular restore testing
Penyebab: Budget constraints untuk backup infrastructure; Inadequate BCP/DRP assessment; Absence of automated backup processes; Limited offsite backup storage
Akibat: Data loss, extended recovery time objective (RTO), loss of revenue, customer dissatisfaction, regulatory penalties, potential business closure
Ancaman: Ransomware Attacks; Hardware Failure; Data Center Disaster; Backup System Compromise; Inadequate Recovery Options
Kerentanan: Insufficient backup copies; No encryption; Absence of geographic diversity; Limited testing; Inadequate access controls
Pengendalian Saat Ini: Basic daily backups; Limited restore testing
Referensi Pengendalian: ISO 27001:2022 A.17.1.1 (Planning Information Security Continuity); A.17.2.1 (Implementing Information Security Continuity); A.8.3.4 (Information and Other Assets Outside the Organization)

Penjabaran Risiko: Inadequate Third-Party Risk Management dan Vendor Security Assessment
Nama Aset: Dokumen Kontrak Kerja Sama (PKS) & NDA Vendor
Akar Masalah: Absence of comprehensive vendor security assessment framework; Inadequate contract security clauses; Insufficient ongoing vendor monitoring; Lack of vendor security audit procedures
Penyebab: Budget optimization focus terhadap vendor selection; Inadequate vendor management governance; Limited resources untuk vendor oversight; Absence of vendor risk scoring mechanism
Akibat: Supply chain security vulnerabilities, data breaches melalui vendor compromise, compliance violations, reputational damage, indirect financial losses
Ancaman: Vendor Security Breaches; Unauthorized Data Access via Vendors; Insecure Data Handling; Vendor Bankruptcy; Geopolitical Constraints
Kerentanan: Weak vendor selection criteria; Inadequate SLA terms; No security audit rights; Insufficient data protection clauses; Limited monitoring
Pengendalian Saat Ini: Basic contract review; Limited vendor monitoring
Referensi Pengendalian: ISO 27001:2022 A.15.1.1 (Information Security Requirements for Supplier Relationships); A.15.2.1 (Addressing Information Security within Supplier Agreements); A.15.2.2 (Information and Communication Technology (ICT) Supply Chain)

Penjabaran Risiko: Inadequate Security Awareness dan Phishing Attack Resilience
Nama Aset: Modul Security Awareness & Hasil Incident Simulation
Akar Masalah: Limited security awareness training program scope dan frequency; Inadequate phishing simulation exercises; Insufficient user education terhadap social engineering tactics
Penyebab: Resource constraints terhadap training infrastructure; Competing business priorities; Lack of awareness tentang human security importance; Limited training budget allocation
Akibat: High phishing click-through rates, credential theft, malware infections, insider threat incidents, compliance violations, financial losses
Ancaman: Phishing Attacks; Social Engineering; Credential Harvesting; Ransomware Distribution; Business Email Compromise
Kerentanan: Inadequate user security knowledge; Low phishing awareness; Absence of security culture; Limited incident reporting; Weak password practices
Pengendalian Saat Ini: Annual mandatory training; Ad-hoc awareness campaigns
Referensi Pengendalian: ISO 27001:2022 A.6.3.1 (Information Security Awareness and Training); A.6.3.2 (Information Security Competence)

Penjabaran Risiko: Inadequate Regulatory Compliance Monitoring dan IT Policy Enforcement
Akar Masalah: Absence of formal compliance monitoring framework; Limited regulatory tracking; Inadequate policy audit procedures; Insufficient compliance gap assessment
Penyebab: Rapid regulatory landscape changes; Limited dedicated compliance resources; Lack of compliance automation tools; Inadequate governance structure
Akibat: Regulatory violations, significant financial penalties (GDPR fines hingga 4% revenue), reputational damage, business operational restrictions, potential license revocation
Ancaman: Regulatory Non-Compliance; Compliance Audit Failures; Policy Violations; Inadequate Audit Trails; Regulatory Penalties
Kerentanan: Absence of compliance monitoring; No automated tracking; Inadequate audit controls; Insufficient documentation; Limited enforcement mechanisms
Pengendalian Saat Ini: Annual compliance audit; Manual compliance tracking
Referensi Pengendalian: ISO 27001:2022 A.5.1.1 (Policies for Information Security); A.5.2.1 (Information Security Roles and Responsibilities); A.18.1.1 (Measurement of Information Security Performance)
